faqs.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Upgrade Plan. Changes are effective immediately.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund?
faqs.answer: Refunds are available within 14 days of payment. Contact support@novasaas.com.

faqs.question: Do you offer enterprise pricing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer custom enterprise plans. Please contact sales@novasaas.com for a quote.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards and PayPal. For enterprise plans, we also support bank transfers.

faqs.question: Does NovaSaaS support SSO?
faqs.answer: Yes, SSO via SAML 2.0 is available on Business and Enterprise plans.

faqs.question: How do I export my data?
faqs.answer: You can export your data anytime by going to Settings → Data Management → Export as standard CSV or JSON.

faqs.question: Is there a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, the NovaSaaS companion app is available on both iOS and Android.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. You'll receive a reset link via email.

faqs.question: Can I change my registered email address?
faqs.answer: Yes, navigate to Profile → Security → Update Email. You will need to verify the new email address.

faqs.question: How do I delete my account?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings → Account → Danger Zone → Delete Account. Please note this action is permanent.

faqs.question: Why am I not receiving notification emails?
faqs.answer: Please check your spam folder. If you still don't see them, ensure 'noreply@novasaas.com' is whitelisted in your email settings.

faqs.question: The dashboard is not loading properly.
faqs.answer: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies, or logging in via an incognito window. If the issue persists, contact support.

faqs.question: I'm encountering an 'Error 500' when syncing data.
faqs.answer: This is likely a temporary system issue. We actively monitor these errors. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

faqs.question: Is my data encrypted?
faqs.answer: Yes, all customer data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit via TLS 1.3.

faqs.question: Do you have SOC 2 Type II compliance?
faqs.answer: Yes, NovaSaaS undergoes an annual SOC 2 Type II audit. The latest report is available upon request for enterprise customers.
